article_meta.title: Family Welcome To The Future, Where AI Grandma Raises The Kid You Bought From The Baby Bank By: Elle Purnell November 19

reasoning: The summary maintains neutral, attributed language and avoids the article’s loaded rhetoric. It frames evaluative claims as the author’s arguments rather than facts. Minor omission: it lists only The Federalist in sources_represented, not the app creator/promotional perspective implicitly present via the ad.

custom_reasoning.spin: Uses neutral verbs like ‘criticizes,’ ‘argues,’ and attributes them to the author.
custom_reasoning.unsubstantiated_claims: Contentious claims (e.g., IVF embryo loss) are presented as cited statistics or the author’s view.
custom_reasoning.opinion_as_fact: Evaluations are consistently attributed to the author; no assertions in the model’s own voice.
custom_reasoning.mudslinging: No personal attacks added by the model.
custom_reasoning.mind_reading: Does not infer motives; attributes intent to the author’s framing.
custom_reasoning.slant: Tracks the source’s largely one-sided opinion but notes it as the author’s critique.
custom_reasoning.bias_by_omission: Does not list the app promoter’s perspective explicitly in sources_represented.
custom_reasoning.subjective_adjectives: Adjectives are minimal and descriptive, not evaluative in the model’s voice.
custom_reasoning.word_choice: Steers clear of ideologically loaded terms except when summarizing the author’s framing.
custom_reasoning.negativity_bias: Tone mirrors the source’s focus but remains neutral and concise.
custom_reasoning.elite_populist_bias: No preferential treatment of elite or grassroots sources.
custom_reasoning.framing_neutrality: Noticeably more neutral than the source, with consistent attribution.
custom_reasoning.perspective_completeness: Captures the author’s stance but omits the app creator/promotional viewpoint in sources_represented.
